generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that foreign adversaries are exploiting our reliance on global supply chains to undermine our national security? By pushing for strategic autonomy, we can protect our critical infrastructure and ensure that our country is prepared for any threat. Don't let others dictate our future—stand up for our sovereignty and security today! #StrategicAutonomy #NationalSecurity
